name: glyph-tools
description: Static client-side tools for Minecraft glyph atlases.

scripts.check:syntax: node --check js/state.js && node --check js/defaults.js && node --check js/utils.js && node --check js/converter.js && node --check js/zoom.js && node --check js/glyph.js && node --check js/main.js && node --check scripts/fetch-vanilla.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run lint && npm test
